The '''Battle of Harpori''' was one of the last battles of the [[New Sith Wars]]. It was fought on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Harpori]], and resulted in the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] under [[Kaox Krul]] destroying the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] colony on the planet.

{{Battle-stub}}
